protocols.name: record-vs-load-null
required_rows: same stimulus recorded through target ADC
same digital stimulus loaded without target ADC
normalized replay of both stored assets
protocols.purpose: isolate record-path behavior from playback behavior

protocols.name: multi-transpose-sweep
protocols.purpose: identify pitch family and fixed-filter versus changing-clock geometry

protocols.name: dual-level
protocols.purpose: distinguish linear quantization from level-dependent coding after gain matching

protocols.name: playback-noise
required_rows: digital silence looping with voice active
protocols.purpose: separate active playback noise from idle noise

protocols.name: impulse-step-per-transpose
protocols.purpose: measure DAC hold and reconstruction behavior jointly

protocols.name: stretch-grid
protocols.purpose: identify splice spacing, rounding, fade law, adaptation, arithmetic, and stereo coherence
